title: Proof of Palm 2026
description: "People love palm trees! You wanna make a work of art that sells? Put out a palm tree and see what happens." (Adrian Pocobelli, Artist Journal 428 12:56) 🌴🌴🌴. For participating, create palm tree themed art, any number of editions at any price, and add "proofofpalm" and "proofofpalm2026" as a tag at mint time to be included in the event page.
